codeReview.summary: RESEARCH.md comprehensively consolidates all optimization research from 10+ source files. All required sections are present: Executive Summary, Hardware Characterization, Optimization Attempts (5 major areas documented), Benchmark Results Summary, Current Bottleneck Analysis, and Open Questions. Key benchmark numbers are accurate (51.72 tok/s, 79µs allreduce latency, 3.38× speedup). The document includes proper data-driven analysis with tables for time breakdowns, throughput comparisons, and optimization impact analysis.

summary: PASS - RESEARCH.md is a comprehensive 783-line consolidation document that successfully synthesizes research from ALL specified source files. Key findings are accurately documented: 51.72 tok/s final throughput (3.38× improvement), 79µs allreduce latency (reduced from 119µs), deferred AR as the dominant optimization (35% improvement), and GPU compute (42%) and allreduce (19%) identified as primary bottlenecks. All 6 Open Questions provide actionable investigation paths. The document includes proper references to all source files (ALLREDUCE_OPTIMIZATION_SUMMARY.md, DOUBLE_BUFFER_*.md, AWQ_IMPLEMENTATION_SUMMARY.md, M3_DEFERRED_AR_IMPLEMENTATION.md, M5_PERSISTENT_KERNEL_SUMMARY.md, MISSION_TP4_OPTIMIZATION.md, bench/*.md files, tests/GEMV_ISOLATION_REPORT.md, and .factory/library/*.md files).
